title: Architectural Sanitization - ID Unification & Pipeline Wiring

C1.description: Signal ID namespace collision: ts signal_id resets per instance
C1.fix_summary: _make_ts_signal_id() produces globally unique ts_{ticker}_{run_suffix}_{counter:04d} strings. TimeSeriesSignal.signal_id changed from Optional[int] to Optional[str]. DB gets new ts_signal_id TEXT column. signal_router._signal_to_dict exposes ts_signal_id. paper_trading_engine.Trade.ts_signal_id added. update_platt_outcomes.py queries ts_signal_id TEXT column.

C2.description: run_etl_pipeline.py never calls PaperTradingEngine; pipeline generates JSONL but zero DB trade rows
C2.fix_summary: overnight_refresh.sh Step 2.5 added: runs run_auto_trader.py --cycles 1 --execution-mode synthetic --proof-mode after pipeline loop. update_platt_outcomes.py called after auto_trader cycle. annotated dead-end in run_etl_pipeline.py with explicit NOTE comment.

C3.description: --execution-mode CLI arg missing from run_auto_trader.py (env-var only)
C3.fix_summary: Added @click.option('--execution-mode', type=click.Choice(['live','synthetic','auto'])) to run_auto_trader.py main(). CLI arg priority-overrides EXECUTION_MODE env var. CLAUDE.md updated with correct synthetic sprint command.

H1.description: confidence_calibrated missing from JSONL write; breaks Platt feedback loop
H1.fix_summary: Added 'confidence_calibrated': signal.confidence_calibrated to _log_quant_validation entry dict in time_series_signal_generator.py.

H2.description: Divergent signal generator init paths in run_etl_pipeline.py vs run_auto_trader.py
H2.fix_summary: Deferred to Phase 7.14. Requires creating models/signal_generator_factory.py and refactoring both pipeline scripts. Risk of regression is higher than benefit given current test coverage.

H3.description: Orphan detection not enforced in holdout mode (threshold 60 days too permissive)
H3.fix_summary: run_20_audit_sprint.sh holdout INTEGRITY_MAX_OPEN_POSITION_AGE_DAYS changed 60->14 days. Orphan whitelist IDs 5,6,11,13,61,62,67 added to INTEGRITY_ORPHAN_WHITELIST_IDS.

M1.description: JSONL path and DB path hardcoded in multiple scripts (inconsistent CWD-relative strings)
M1.fix_summary: Created etl/paths.py with ROOT-relative constants (DB_PATH, QUANT_VALIDATION_JSONL, FORECAST_AUDITS_DIR, FORECAST_AUDITS_CACHE). Updated update_platt_outcomes.py, check_quant_validation_health.py, ci_integrity_gate.py, production_audit_gate.py to import from etl.paths.

M2.description: forecast_audits_cache not refreshed by overnight_refresh.sh; production gate at 7 AM has stale data
M2.fix_summary: overnight_refresh.sh Step 3 now calls production_audit_gate.py (exit ignored with || true) to refresh forecast_audits_cache/latest_summary.json after each overnight run.

M3.description: Gate hierarchy undefined; no master orchestrator
M3.fix_summary: Created scripts/run_all_gates.py: runs ci_integrity_gate -> check_quant_validation_health -> production_audit_gate in order. Flags: --skip-forecast-gate, --skip-profitability-gate, --strict, --json, --db. Non-zero exit if any blocking gate fails.

M4.description: Signal router dead-end in ETL pipeline undocumented; future developers confused
M4.fix_summary: Added explicit NOTE comment block in run_etl_pipeline.py after signal routing stage: 'Signal routing above is for quant_validation.jsonl logging ONLY. Signals are NOT executed here.'

M5.description: Legacy trades have NULL model attribution (ts_signal_id); 84 existing rows unattributed
M5.fix_summary: migrate_add_ts_signal_id.py backfills legacy rows with synthetic IDs: legacy_{trade_date}_{id}. Applied: 84 rows backfilled. Script is idempotent.

L1.description: DB path resolution inconsistent across scripts (different env var names, relative strings)
L1.fix_summary: Handled by C1 (etl/paths.py). DB_PATH respects PORTFOLIO_DB_PATH env var override. Scripts that previously hardcoded 'data/portfolio_maximizer.db' now use _DEFAULT_DB_PATH from etl.paths.
